result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: 1/2, 1, 2
JUSTIFICATION: In the context of single-photon Hawking radiation classicality, the dimensionless constants derived from the thermal distribution and the relationship between energy and temperature are 1/2 (related to the variance/fluctuation), 1 (the scale factor), and 2 (the factor in the exponent of the Planck distribution).
